allow: Bash(docker exec mongo mongosh -u admin -p admin123 --authenticationDatabase admin --eval "use\(''binance-tele-bot''\); db.stats\(\)")

Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(f''Funding: {float\(d[0][""fundingRate""]\)*100:.4f}%''\)" echo "=== Open Interest ===" curl -s "https://fapi.binance.com/fapi/v1/openInterest?symbol=SAHARAUSDT")

Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(f''OI: {float\(d[""openInterest""]\):,.0f} contracts''\)" echo "=== Long/Short Ratio ===" curl -s "https://fapi.binance.com/futures/data/globalLongShortAccountRatio?symbol=SAHARAUSDT&period=1h&limit=1")

Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(f''L/S Ratio: {float\(d[0][""longShortRatio""]\):.2f} \(Long: {float\(d[0][""longAccount""]\)*100:.1f}%, Short: {float\(d[0][""shortAccount""]\)*100:.1f}%\)''\)")
